examples: Some soils are actually too alkaline for certain plant life.
Antacids are alkaline and they relieve pain by neutralizing acid in the contents of the stomach.
Part of a healthy diet is drinking at least 2 liters of pure (ideally alkaline) mineral water every day.
An alkaline cell with sufficient power density may soon, however, be on the way.
The innermost layer of each pellet contains the drug mixed with an alkaline stabilizer.
